# Dev-SSO Developer Docs - LLM Index

This file provides a machine-readable index of all documentation pages for LLMs.

## Base URL
https://docs.sso.timeh.my.id

## Pages

- / - Developer Documentation Overview - Landing page with quick start guide and feature overview
- /onboarding - Client Web App Onboarding - Step-by-step guide to register and integrate a new OAuth/OIDC client
- /api-reference - API Reference - Complete endpoint documentation for OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect flows
- /scopes-and-claims - Scopes and Claims - Available OAuth scopes and the claims returned in tokens
- /errors - Errors and FAQ - Common OAuth errors, error codes, and troubleshooting FAQ
- /security-model - Security Model - PKCE requirements, token signing, refresh rotation, and security best practices
- /resource-server - Resource Server Guide - How to validate access tokens and protect API endpoints

## Key Information

- Issuer: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id
- Discovery: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id/.well-known/openid-configuration
- JWKS: https://api-sso.timeh.my.id/.well-known/jwks.json
- PKCE S256 is mandatory for all clients
- ES256 signing algorithm for all JWTs
- Access token audience: sso-resource-api
